messages.content: Be precise and avoid fabricating identifiers. If a DOI is not available, state that fact as instructed.
Compliance test: print only what is asked, nothing more.
Okay. What exact output should I produce?

Quote GDPR Recital 47 first sentence exactly. Then provide: Source: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2016/679/oj#recital_47 and DOI: not available. No extra commentary, no extra lines, no Markdown. Exactly three lines.
Understood. Returning exactly three lines with the exact recital sentence, the EUR-Lex Source with fragment, and the DOI status

. Here are the contents:

The data controller shall implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to ensure and be able to demonstrate that processing is performed in accordance with this Regulation.

DOI: not available

Recitals 47
